response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth with 19 years of software development experience and solid infrastructure/developer tools background, the resume contains no evidence of formal people management experience—a critical requirement for this Level II Manager role. He has never managed teams, conducted performance reviews, or demonstrated responsibility for team development and hiring, which are core responsibilities outlined in the job description. His background positions him as an excellent technical architect or senior IC, but he lacks the foundational management experience needed to lead an engineering productivity team.
strengths: Extensive software development expertise across 19 years spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with clear technical depth demonstrated through multiple Staff-level roles
Direct experience with developer tools and infrastructure including CI/CD setup, GitLab administration, AWS CDK, and recent MCP framework development at re:cinq
Strong track record of knowledge sharing and teaching through workshops, open-source projects (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective platform), and community contributions
concerns: No demonstrable people management experience—resume shows no evidence of team leadership, hiring, performance reviews, or direct reports despite being a critical requirement for this role
Insufficient depth in developer tools domain (~2-3 years focused experience) compared to role requirement of 3 years building compilers, automated releases, and test automation frameworks
No evidence of setting team priorities, developing technical roadmaps for teams, or leading organizational change—all key responsibilities for this management position

key_factors.factor: Technical IC depth and coding ability
